title: Add Snowflake IP Whitelist Instructions to Connection UI
story: As a Salesforce administrator connecting DataTools Pro to Snowflake, I want step-by-step instructions for whitelisting the DataTools Pro IP address in my Snowflake network policy, so that I can configure secure access without searching for documentation externally.
description:
Add a new accordion section to the Snowflake connection UI with instructions for whitelisting the DataTools Pro IP address in the user's Snowflake network policy.

**Instructions include:**
1. Show current network policies: `SHOW NETWORK POLICIES;`
2. Add the DataTools Pro IP (US & CA: 147.182.234.144): `ALTER NETWORK POLICY ADD ALLOWED_IP_LIST = ('147.182.234.144');`
3. Link to Snowflake documentation on managing network policies

The accordion section is placed alongside the existing OAuth credential setup accordion.
acceptance_criteria: New accordion section titled 'How to whitelist DataTools Pro IP address' is present
Instructions include SHOW NETWORK POLICIES and ALTER NETWORK POLICY commands
DataTools Pro IP address (147.182.234.144) is clearly displayed
Accordion expands and collapses independently of other sections
ux_changes: New accordion section in the Snowflake connection dialog with network policy whitelist instructions and DataTools Pro IP address.
implementation_notes: Info icon tooltip content and tutorial video still pending at time of implementation.
comment_summary: Developer added the accordion content and noted that info icon tooltips and the tutorial video URL were still pending.
